metadata.description: Maniax — Claude Code plugins collection. Ships: memory-system (4-tier knowledge & memory), marketing-toolkit (8 marketing skills from Google's Digital Marketing certificate), learn-coursera (meta-skill for turning Coursera courses into Claude Code skills), and second-brain (LLM-maintained Obsidian wiki).

plugins.name: memory-system
plugins.description: 4-tier knowledge & memory system: rules + project memory + universal memory + auto-sync. Bundles 5 skills, 3 hooks, and a pre-commit gate that enforces knowledge updates.

plugins.name: marketing-toolkit
plugins.description: 8 marketing skills distilled from Google's Digital Marketing & E-commerce Professional Certificate: SEO audit, email campaign builder + metrics, social media calendar + listening, A/B test designer, AI prompt engineering (T-C-R-E-I), and GA4+Google Ads unified dashboard. Every skill bundles deterministic Python scripts + reference docs. Average benchmark: 93 percent pass rate vs 48 percent baseline.

plugins.name: learn-coursera
plugins.description: Meta-skill for turning Coursera courses into Claude Code skills. Discovers top professional courses on any topic, extracts video transcripts via Playwright, enriches them into actionable notes, scores skill-worthiness with a 5-criteria rubric, then builds + benchmarks new skills and packages them as plugins. Handles single courses and Professional Certificates. Triggers on English and Vietnamese prompts.

plugins.name: second-brain
plugins.description: LLM-maintained personal knowledge wiki for your Obsidian vault. Implements the LLM Wiki pattern: instead of RAG on every query, the LLM incrementally compiles knowledge into a persistent, cross-linked wiki of markdown files. Operations: ingest (source → wiki), query (synthesize with citations), lint (broken links / orphans / contradictions), note (discrete topical file), brain-dump (timestamped journal), kanban tasks. Vault path is configurable via the SECOND_BRAIN_VAULT environment variable. Triggers on English and Vietnamese prompts.
